items.title: Why OpenAI's 'goblin' problem matters — and how you can release the goblins on your own

items.title: Claude Code, Copilot and Codex all got hacked. Every attacker went for the credential, not the model.
items.summary: On March 30, BeyondTrust proved that a crafted GitHub branch name could steal Codex’s OAuth token in cleartext. OpenAI classified it Critical P1.
